description: Teamfluence is a LinkedIn tool that tracks social signals and enriches leads to power sales outreach and social selling.
tagline: LinkedIn social signal tracking for sales
overview: Teamfluence tracks LinkedIn social signals like profile visits and post engagement, then uses AI to qualify and enrich them with contact data for sales teams.
what_is: Teamfluence is a LinkedIn automation tool for sales teams. It tracks and collects social signals such as profile visits, post engagements, and connections, then uses AI to qualify and enrich them with emails and phone numbers, helping identify buyers early.

It is strongest for automating lead generation and social selling, building targeted LinkedIn networks across team accounts and surfacing buyer signals quickly. Teamfluence feeds enriched leads into your CRM or sales tools, focused on LinkedIn activity rather than acting as a standalone CRM or email platform.
